body:
Dear all, 

The proposal has been made to obsolete 'GO:0019584 galactonate catabolic process', because it is an unnecessary grouping term. Please replace by either 

- GO:0034194 D-galactonate catabolic process
- GO:0034195 L-galactonate catabolic process

There is a single annotation by EcoCyc, that should be replaced by GO:0034195 L-galactonate catabolic process.

comments.body:
- GO:0046181 ketogluconate catabolic process >> replace by child GO:0019524 keto-D-gluconate catabolic process
- GO:0046180 ketogluconate biosynthetic process >> no annotations, no cross references
- GO:0046179 keto-D-gluconate biosynthetic process >> no annotations, no cross references

title: Obsoletion request: 'galactonate catabolic process'
